Source: https://github.com/Power-Supply-Manufacturers-Association/MAS
License: Apache-2.0
Snapshot date: 2026-05-07T01:12:45Z
Commit: 14aaa487ecf7569cc21ae451446a36b33d94fd99

Files vendored (subset of the upstream data/ tree):
- core_materials.ndjson  (~411 entries: ferrites + powders)
- wires.ndjson           (~4352 entries: round + Litz copper)
- cores.ndjson           (~10318 entries: vendor + material + shape + gap)
- core_shapes.ndjson     (~150 shapes: dimension envelopes per IEC family)

The cores file references shape names that resolve via core_shapes.ndjson;
scripts/import_mas_cores.py joins the two and converts to our Core model
(reusing the shape decoders from import_pyetk_catalog.py).
